--- Page: /about-us ---
About Us - ZenTea
Free Shipping Orders Over $60!
For Wholesale Orders & Inquiries Email zenteawholesale@gmail.com
Indulge in the
Art of Tea
at our beloved family-owned tea house, a cherished part of the Atlanta community since 2008. With a selection of over 150 premium full-leaf teas, quality herbs, tea bags, and a range of accessories, we’re your gateway to a world of tea delights. We’re here to make savoring premium, rare teas a breeze while infusing each cup with our genuine passion for the
ZenTea
experience.
Come join us soon at our tea haven!
If you ever require assistance while placing your order, feel free to reach out to our dedicated team at 678-547-0877. Additionally, we invite you to visit our flagship tea house in Atlanta, Georgia, where you can partake in delightful Tea Tastings and enriching Tea Classes. We look forward to serving you.

--- Page: /zen-events ---
Zen Events - ZenTea
Free Shipping Orders Over $60!
For Wholesale Orders & Inquiries Email zenteawholesale@gmail.com
CLASSES & EVENTS
Join The ZenTea Team!
Love tea and connecting with others? ZenTea is hiring team members to help us craft memorable tea experiences. We’d love to hear from you!
Email your resume to
zenteaatl@gmail.com
The ZenTea Winter Tea Latte Experience
Create café style winter tea lattes with tea forward flavors, seasonal spices, and practical techniques for everyday use.
Date and time: Saturday, February 7, 5:45 pm – 6:45 pm EST
Location: 5356 Peachtree Road Chamblee, GA 30341
CLICK TO REGISTER
Black Tea Tasting & Blending
A black tea tasting experience featuring warm flavors, creative blending, and a cozy atmosphere for tea lovers of all levels.
Date and time: Saturday, February 28, 5:45 pm – 6:45 pm EST
Location: 5356 Peachtree Road Chamblee, GA 30341
CLICK TO REGISTER
Winter Beverages Workshop.
Craft cozy winter tea beverages. Learn warming blends, spices, and techniques perfect for the season.
Date and time: Saturday, January 17, 5:45 pm – 6:45 pm EST
Location: 5356 Peachtree Road Chamblee, GA 30341.
CLICK TO REGISTER
Fall Tea Blending Workshop
Blend your own fall-inspired tea at ZenTea! Create, taste, and take home a custom blend in this cozy hands-on workshop.
Date and time: Saturday, October 4, 5:45 pm – 6:45 pm EST
Location: 5356 Peachtree Road Chamblee, GA 30341
CLICK TO REGISTER
Oolong in Autumn: A Seasonal Tea Tasting
A guided oolong tea tasting to explore flavor, tradition, and balance—perfectly paired with the spirit of the autumn season.
Date and time: Saturday, October 11, 5:45 pm – 6:45 pm EST
Location: 5356 Peachtree Road Chamblee, GA 30341
CLICK TO REGISTER
Is My Tea Talking to Me? – Herbal Potion Edition
Discover the magic of herbs in this sensory “potion” workshop. Taste, blend, and connect with plants in a new way.
Date and time: Saturday, October 25, 5:45 pm – 6:45 pm EST
Location: 5356 Peachtree Road Chamblee, GA 30341
CLICK TO REGISTER
Is My Tea Talking to Me? – Halloween Sensory Tea Tasting
A Halloween tea experience where imagination meets flavor as Pu’erh and malty teas invite you to listen a little closer.
Date and time: Saturday, November 1, 5:45 pm – 6:45 pm EST
Location: 5356 Peachtree Road Chamblee, GA 30341
CLICK TO REGISTER
Fall Tea Latte Workshop
Learn to craft cozy fall tea lattes! Taste seasonal blends, master techniques, and take home café-quality skills.
Date and time: Saturday, November 8, 5:45 pm – 6:45 pm EST
Location: 5356 Peachtree Road Chamblee, GA 30341
CLICK TO REGISTER
A Premium Tasting Experience
Explore the delicate flavors of our premium high-elevation teas, prized for their complexity, aroma, and rich history from top tea-growing regions.
Date and time: Saturday, April 12, 5:45 pm – 6:45 pm EST
Location: 5356 Peachtree Road Chamblee, GA 30341
CLICK TO REGISTER
DIY Mix & Match: How Do You Like Your Tea?
Mix, match, and create! Explore seasonal blends and craft your perfect tea

meta.meta_description: It is our passion to share with you the Zen Experience of tea. We offer over 150 premium full leaf teas, herbs, quality pyramid tea bags, iced tea pouches
